title: Desacato a la autoridad, relatos de punks en Argentina 1983-1988
original_title: Desacato a la autoridad, relatos de punks en Argentina 1983-1988
overview: Documentary that proposes a tour of the initial stages, and also the lesser known ones, of the Argentine punk during the decade of the eighties.
